zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilles Brydges於1462年1月7日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利時，他的父親Thomas Brugge35歲，母親Florence Darell37歲。他於1490年與Isabell Baynham在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩結婚。他在英國格盧斯特斯爾被列為sheriff of gloucestershire。他去世於1511年12月1日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可利享年49歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilles Brydges于1462年1月7日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利时，他的父亲Thomas Brugge35岁，母亲Florence Darell37岁。他于1490年与Isabell Baynham在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩结婚。他在英国格盧斯特斯爾被列为sheriff of gloucestershire。他去世于1511年12月1日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可利享年49岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利。

nameMeanings.name: Brydges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Gilles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilles Brydges was born on 7 January 1462, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Thomas Brugge, was 35 and his mother, Florence Darell, was 37. He married Isabell Baynham in 1490, in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. His occupation is listed as sheriff of gloucestershire in Gloucestershire, England. He died on 1 December 1511, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilles Brydges est né le 7 janvier 1462, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Brugge, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Florence Darell, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Isabell Baynham en 1490, à Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of gloucestershire à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 décembre 1511, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilles Brydges am 7. Januar 1462 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Brugge 35 und seine Mutter Florence Darell 37. Er hat 1490 in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Isabell Baynham geheiratet. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of gloucestershire in Gloucestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Dezember 1511 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilles Brydges è nato il il 7 gennaio 1462 nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Brugge, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Florence Darell, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Isabell Baynham nel 1490, nel Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of gloucestershire nel Gloucestershire, England. Morì il 1 dicembre 1511, nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilles Brydgesが1462年1月7日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Bruggeは35歳，母Florence Darellは37歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアミッチェルディーンでIsabell Baynhamと結婚した。イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of gloucestershireと記録されている。彼は1511年12月1日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで49歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilles Brydges(이)가 1462년 1월 7일 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Brugge(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Florence Darell(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 미트헬디에서 Isabell Baynham(와)과 결혼했다. 그의 직업은 영국 그루스스터실르에서 sheriff of gloucestershire이었다. 그는 1511년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에 묻혔다.

pt.7 January 1462–1 December 1511: 7 de janeiro de 1462–1 de dezembro de 1511
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilles Brydges nasceu em 7 de janeiro de 1462, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Brugge, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Florence Darell, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabell Baynham em 1490, em Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of gloucestershire em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1511, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilles Brydges родился 7 января 1462 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Brugge было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence Darell, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell Baynham в 1490 г. в местности мичелдин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of gloucestershire в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Он умер 1 декабря 1511 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.7 January 1462–1 December 1511: 7 de enero de 1462–1 de diciembre de 1511
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilles Brydges nació el 7 de enero de 1462, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Brugge, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Florence Darell, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Isabell Baynham en 1490, en Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of gloucestershire en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1511, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
